name: sentinel-scan-action
description: GitHub Action for EU AI Act compliance scanning with Sentinel
author: sentinel-ai

scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator index.js --output lib/index-obfuscated.js --compact true --self-defending false --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --rename-globals true
scripts.build: npm run obfuscate && ncc build lib/index-obfuscated.js -o dist --minify --no-cache
